name: smartharvest-microservices
description: SmartHarvest Microservices - PLBK Universitas Syiah Kuala

scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../harvest-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../weather-service && npm install && cd ../chat-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "node api-gateway/server.js" "node user-service/server.js" "node harvest-service/server.js" "node order-service/server.js" "node weather-service/server.js" "node chat-service/server.js"
scripts.start: concurrently "node api-gateway/server.js" "node user-service/server.js" "node harvest-service/server.js" "node order-service/server.js" "node weather-service/server.js" "node chat-service/server.js"
